_comment: ShadCN base manifest — ground truth extracted from src/components source. apply-shadcn-base.mjs merges these base fields into ads.components.json; enrich-component-metadata.mjs derives the rich metadata. Hand-edit here, not in ads.components.json.

keyProps.name: asChild

examples.jsx: ClientOnly is a render-gating helper, not a visual component. Mount children only after hydration with a useEffect/useState gate.

examples.name: Intl format
examples.jsx: {new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", { style: "currency", currency: "USD" }).format(1234.56)}{new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US").format(2048000)}

examples.name: Note
examples.jsx: Locale is a context helper for i18n formatting, not a visual component. Provide a locale via React context and read it where you format dates/numbers.

examples.name: Note
examples.jsx: Presence is a mount/unmount animation helper. In this stack use tw-animate-css classes or Radix data-state transitions instead.

examples.name: Note
examples.jsx: Environment is a DOM-environment provider (for portals in shadow DOM/iframes), not a visual component.

examples.name: Note
examples.jsx: FocusTrap is a behavior helper. Radix Dialog/Popover trap focus automatically; use those instead of a standalone trap.

examples.name: Note
examples.jsx: Portal renders children into another DOM node. Use ReactDOM.createPortal, or rely on Radix portals built into Dialog/Popover/Tooltip.

examples.name: Conditional

components.name: Chart

keyProps.name: config
keyProps.note: ChartConfig mapping data keys to label + color (drives --color-* vars).

keyProps.name: data
keyProps.note: Row data passed to the recharts chart.

examples.name: Bar chart
examples.jsx: <ChartContainer config={{ desktop: { label: "Desktop", color: "var(--primary)" } }} className="h-48 w-80"><BarChart data={[{ month: "Jan", desktop: 120 }, { month: "Feb", desktop: 180 }, { month: "Mar", desktop: 90 }, { month: "Apr", desktop: 200 }]}><CartesianGrid vertical={false} /><XAxis dataKey="month" tickLine={false} axisLine={false} tickMargin={8} /><Bar dataKey="desktop" fill="var(--color-desktop)" radius={4} /></BarChart></ChartContainer>

components.description: Themed recharts wrapper with tooltip/legend and token-driven colors.
accessibility: Provide accessible names for interactive triggers; preserve built-in keyboard/ARIA behavior.
